Continue Select Your Location - Europe - Middle East - North America - South America - Latin America - Asia/Pacific United Kingdom United States 中国大陆 日本 CN-HK Thailand Search DREAME X50 Ultra Overview Clear Reaches Powerful Cleaning PowerDock Intelligence Package List & Specs DREAME X50 Ultra # Dreame X50 Ultra Rise up, clean beneath *Unless specified, comparisons are to our previous products, with data up to release date.*Creative materials are for advertising purposes only. Please refer to the actual product. Discover X50 Ultra, redefining cleaning as it rises up, and cleans beneath. Experience unmatched freedom with advanced features like effortless obstacle climbing and navigation, extensive coverage, and smart automation. Say goodbye to limitations and hello to a pristine home. HyperStream™ Detangling DuoBrush Minimizes Tangles Industry-First ProLeap™ System VersaLift Navigation for Low Space Cleaning Upgraded AceClean™ DryBoard Dual Flex Arm Technology for Tricky Corners Adaptive Intelligent PowerDock™ Powerful Suction Grants Impeccable Results Seamless App Voice Control HyperStream™ Detangling DuoBrush Minimizes Tangles Industry-First ProLeap™ System VersaLift Navigation for Low Space Cleaning Upgraded AceClean™ DryBoard Dual Flex Arm Technology for Tricky Corners Adaptive Intelligent PowerDock™ Powerful Suction Grants Impeccable Results Seamless App Voice Control First of it's kind obstacle clearing for the ultimate clean. The ProLeap™ system elevates X50 Ultra 's ability to navigate your home like never before* by utilizing a wheeled robot design. It allows the robotic vacuum to traverse previously unpassable obstacles to take the next step in the future of automatic home cleaning. ## Quietly Conquer Ledges and More Climb over Obstacles up to 6cm Lower Noise Climb over Obstacles up to 6cm The ProLeap™ system can smoothly climb over obstacles up to 6cm* high, with a system that absorbs shocks for quiet cleaning. It cleverly lifts the Retractable Legs, making it easy to get over door tracks, double-layer thresholds, and U-shaped furniture without damage. X50 Ultra, with the highest industry standard leap*, brings you the next generation of cleaning. Lower Noise The integrated shock absorption system prevents harsh collisions and keeps noise levels impressively low, providing quiet, efficient cleaning in every environment. With DREAME Cross 4.2cm single-layer thresholds with smooth movements and flexible obstacle avoidance. with DREAME With OthersUnable to cross 4.2cm thresholds and are susceptible to damage and collisions with obstacles. with Others With DREAME Cross 4.2cm single-layer thresholds with smooth movements and flexible obstacle avoidance. with DREAME With OthersUnable to cross 4.2cm thresholds and are susceptible to damage and collisions with obstacles. with Others 01/02 World's 1st Robotic Retractable Legs Designed for endurance, the X50 Ultra’s Retractable Legs power through an impressive 30,000 cycles*, ensuring durability you can rely on. Tested for the long run, it’s made to tackle your cleaning tasks day after day. Plus, our complimentary warranty service* gives you extra peace of mind. ## 360° Smart Mapping & Low-Profile Cleaning 360° Scanning Drops to 89mm 360° Scanning X50 Ultra ’s DToF system elevates its 360°* scanning sensor, creating a detailed, blind spot-free map for precise navigation without unnecessary spinning. Drops to 89mm When the retractable DToF sensor lowers, X50 Ultra ’s height drops to 89mm*, facilitating its navigation under low furniture where other robot vacuums struggle. Using an ultra-powerful AI camera, it excels in cleaning

Formulated for robot vacuums, it penetrates and lifts stubborn stains. Suitable for a wide range of hard floor types, including wood, tile, marble, stone, and sealed hard floors, this solution helps eliminate odors and lightly freshen the air as it cleans. Compatible with Dreame all robot vacuums - Package Dimensions:10.43 × 5.39 × 2.76 inches - Volume: 1 Bottle of 33.81 fl Oz (1L) Notice: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. If swallowed or if the solution comes into contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with plenty of water and seek immediate medical attention. Store sealed, in a cool, dry, well-ventilated area at room temperature. Do not mix with other chemical detergents. - + Confirm $18.99 The required quantity exceeds the available inventory Dreame TroboWave™ Detangling DuoBrush $44.99 Detangling DuoBrush is engineered for powerful, tangle-free cleaning across every surface in your home. - The bristled rubber brush maintains close contact with hard floors to sweep up fine dust and dirt hidden between tiles and along edges.
